title: [UNOFFICIAL] LesRaisins Tactical Equipements 1.21.1 NeoForge
description: LesRaisins Tactical Equipements (NeoForge 1.21.1) is a ported version of the original mod, adapted for NeoForge 1.21.1, and designed as an addon for Timeless and Classics Guns Zero.
body:
## Unofficial TaCZ 1.21.1 NeoForge Port

[![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fmodrinth_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/lr-tactical-1.21.1)
[![CurseForge](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fcurseforge_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lr-tactical-1-21-1)
[![GitHub](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fgithub_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://github.com/Nahiyus512/LesRaisins-Tactical-Equipements-1.21.1)

This is an **unofficial port** of the Minecraft gun-related mod  
[LesRaisins Tactical Equipements](https://modrinth.com/mod/lr-tactical)  
to **Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge)**.

The full description of the original mod can be found in the sections below.

**DO NOT report any issues related to this port to the original developers.**

Please report issues only via:
 
- GitHub Issues
👉 [#GitHub issue](https://github.com/Nahiyus512/LesRaisins-Tactical-Equipements-1.21.1/issues)
- Discord 
👉 [#community-showcase > Unofficial lr-tactical 1.21.1 NeoForge Port](https://discord.com/channels/1243278348399022252/1461925362815733791)

**Gun packs from TaCZ 1.20.1 are NOT compatible with this port**  
**Additional steps are required for gun packs to function properly**  
Please refer to the `Gun Pack Compatibility` section below.

## Gun Pack Compatibility

On **Minecraft 1.21.1**, some gun pack features may be broken or non-functional by default.

To resolve this, you need to install the **TaCZ Pack Upgrader** developed by **MUKSC**:  
[TaCZ Pack Upgrader](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-pack-upgrader)  
- GitHub
  👉 https://github.com/MUKSC/TaCZPackUpgrader

This tool upgrades **TaCZ 1.20.1 gun packs** to a format compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.1**.

Please refer to the upgrader mod’s documentation for detailed usage instructions.

![lrtactical.png](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Flrtactical.png&n=-1)

A addon for **Timeless and Classics Guns Zero** that adds **throwables, melee weapons, and extended support** for gun packs.

# Contents and Features

Built-in pack contains:

🎥 **Showcase Video**  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0m2d-KuvxDc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Melee Weapon

![melee](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Fmelee.png&n=-1)

- Dagger  
- Karambit  
- Baseball Bat  

## Throwables

![throwable](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Fthrowable.png&n=-1)

- M67 Grenade  
- RGN Grenade  
- Smoke Grenade  
- Flash Grenade  

## Shield

![shield](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Fshield.png&n=-1)

- Flash Shield  

## UGC Support

![ugc](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Fugc.png&n=-1)

Additional ability to define **melee weapons** and **throwable items** for **TACZ gun packs**.

## Dependency

![dependency](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fq1.boheurl.com%2Flesraisins%2Fi%2F2025%2F05%2F26%2Fdependency.png&n=-1)

This is a **MOD**.  
Please put the `.jar` file in the **mods** folder **(do NOT put it in the TACZ gun pack path)**.

**Required dependency:**
- Timeless and Classics Guns Zero (**TACZ**) `1.1.5` or above
